title: Jamwa Ramgarh Wildlife Sanctuary
tagline: Jamwa Ramgarh Wildlife Sanctuary — wildlife reserve of Rajasthan

overview.short: Jamwa Ramgarh Wildlife Sanctuary is a protected area situated about 35 km northeast of Jaipur in the Jaipur district of Rajasthan, India.
overview.description: Jamwa Ramgarh Wildlife Sanctuary is a protected area situated about 35 km northeast of Jaipur in the Jaipur district of Rajasthan, India. Established in 1982, the sanctuary covers approximately 300 km² in the Aravalli Range and encompasses the now-dry Ramgarh Lake basin and surrounding forests.

topPlaces.name: Ramgarh Lake
topPlaces.description: Ramgarh Lake was a lake situated in Jamwa Ramgarh, near Jaipur city in the Jaipur district in Indian state of Rajasthan. The last time the lake received water was 1999 and it has been dry since 2000.

topPlaces.name: Jamwa Ramgarh
topPlaces.description: Jamwa Ramgarh also popularly known as the Ramgarh, is a subdivision of the Jaipur district in Rajasthan, India. It is located on State Highway 55, about 28 kilometres (17 mi) East-North of Jaipur city.

items.note: Ramgarh Lake was a lake situated in Jamwa Ramgarh, near Jaipur city in the Jaipur district in Indian state of Rajasthan. The last time the lake received water was 1999 and it has been dry since 2000.

Jamwa Ramgarh also popularly known as the Ramgarh, is a subdivision of the Jaipur district in Rajasthan, India. It is located on State Highway 55, about 28 kilometres (17 mi) East-North of Jaipur city.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Jamwa Ramgarh Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: The best time to visit Jamwa Ramgarh Wildlife Sanctuary is Oct – Mar. Summers are 28–44°C and winters are 8–25°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Jamwa Ramgarh Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Jaipur International Airport (35 km) and the nearest railway station is Jaipur Junction (30 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Jamwa Ramgarh Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Jamwa Ramgarh Wildlife Sanctuary at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Jamwa Ramgarh Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: Stays in Jamwa Ramgarh Wildlife Sanctuary start from ₹2,500 per night, with options across 5 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Jamwa Ramgarh Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: The top attractions are Ramgarh Lake, Jamwa Ramgarh.
